# Geotechnik — Munster

> Geotechnical engineering services in Munster, Deutschland.

## Services
- [Atterberg Grenzen](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/atterberg-grenzen/)
- [Aushub](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/aushub/)
- [Aushub Monitoring](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/aushub-monitoring/)

- [Boschungsstabilitat](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/boschungsstabilitat/)
- [Cbr Strasse](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/cbr-strasse/)
- [Erdbebenisolierung](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/erdbebenisolierung/)
- [Flexibler Belag](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/flexibler-belag/)

- [Geophysik](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/geophysik/)
- [Grundungen](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/grundungen/)
- [Hange](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/hange/)
- [Korngrossenanalyse](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/korngrossenanalyse/)

- [Labor In Situ](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/labor-in-situ/)

- [Plattendruckversuch](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/plattendruckversuch/)
- [Sandkegel Dichte](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/sandkegel-dichte/)
- [Schottersaulen](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/schottersaulen/)
- [Seismik](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/seismik/)

- [Strassenbau](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/strassenbau/)
- [Stutzmauern](https://munster.geotechnik.sbs/stutzmauern/)

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Munster, Deutschland.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
